title: senecio crucaefolius
intro: Senecio crucaefolius, also known as the ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural laxative and a treatment for various digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion. The health benefits of Senecio crucaefolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower cholesterol levels, and even act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Senecio crucaefolius include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders.
